title: Verify trial widget displays correct remaining days on homepage for active trial
description: Test that the persistent trial widget on homepage shows accurate remaining days for users with active trial

steps.description: 1. Activate a trial account with 7-day duration
3. Locate the trial widget in header area
4. Verify the displayed remaining days match the trial activation date

expected_result: Trial widget displays 'X Days Remaining' with correct count and includes 'Manage Control Center' link
